complaints.message:
Confirm object synset assignment.
Object assigned to synset: package.n.01
Definition: a collection of things wrapped or boxed together
Reminder: synset should match the object and not its contents.
(e.g. orange juice bottle needs to match orange_juice__bottle.n.01
and not orange_juice.n.01)

Confirm object visual appearance.
Requirements:
- make sure there is only one rigid body.
- make sure the object has a valid texture or appearance.
- make sure the object has all parts necessary.
Was at least one of the collision mesh candidates acceptable?
complaints.complaint: has no thickness and somehow vhacd did not run so we do not have good thickness samples

complaints.message: Was at least one of the collision mesh candidates acceptable?
